_meta.description: Spot-check items for manual verification of OCR/AI extractions against physical manuals
_meta.methodology: Each item identifies one extracted value and tells the user exactly where to look in the physical manual to verify it. Prioritized by safety criticality and OCR error likelihood.

markers.mismatch: Does NOT match — verified_value has the correct value
markers.ambiguous: Cannot read clearly in manual — needs better scan or photo

spot_checks.lookup: Open SD.pdf → page 78 → find C113 row → signal wire leaving sensor pin 2
Open SD.pdf → page 78 → find C114 row → ground wire leaving sensor pin 3. Previously misread as G/B — confirm Brown (Br)
spot_checks.notes: This wire was corrected from 0.5G/B to 0.5Br based on user photo. Spot-check confirms the correction.

spot_checks.lookup: Open SD.pdf → page 78 → find C112 row → signal wire from TPS pin 2 to ECM
Open SD.pdf → page 78 → find C113 row → power wire from C142 joint connector to sensor pin 1
spot_checks.notes: Power supply wire through SNSR FUSE 10A. Wrong color here = wrong fuse identification.

spot_checks.lookup: Open SD.pdf → page 78 → find C125 row → MAF signal wire to ECM. Is the wire size 0.50mm or is 0.5O (Orange)?
spot_checks.notes: The '0' in '0.50' may be an 'O' (Orange) wire color abbreviation. OCR frequently confuses 0/O in this context.

spot_checks.lookup: Open SD.pdf → page 78 → find C114 row → CMP signal wire from sensor pin 2 to ECM C133-4
spot_checks.notes: B (black) is unusual for a signal wire — most signals use colored wires. Verify this isn't a misread.

spot_checks.lookup: Open EMA.pdf → page 5 → find 'Cylinder head bolt' row → verify Nm value and both angle steps
spot_checks.notes: Multi-step angle torque. Critical: wrong initial torque or angle range = head gasket failure.

spot_checks.field: Main bearing cap bolt M10 torque
spot_checks.lookup: Open EMA.pdf → page 5 → find 'Main bearing cap bolt — M10' row → verify Nm range and angle steps
spot_checks.notes: Angle torque. OCR often misreads degree symbols and plus signs in these compound specs.

spot_checks.lookup: Open EMA.pdf → page 5 → find 'Connecting rod bolt' row → verify Nm range and angle steps
Open EMA.pdf → page 5 → find 'Camshaft sprocket bolt' row → verify Nm range
Open EMA.pdf → page 5 → find 'Fly wheel bolt' row → verify Nm range

spot_checks.field: Intake manifold to cylinder head torque
spot_checks.lookup: Open EMA.pdf → page 5-6 → find 'Intake manifold to cylinder head' row → verify Nm range
Cross-reference ecm-pinouts.md C133-3 pin 8 against SD.pdf page 78 ECM bottom row — verify pin 8 connects to C113 CKP
spot_checks.notes: ECM pin numbers are critical for Haltech wiring. Wrong pin = wrong sensor input.

spot_checks.lookup: Cross-reference ecm-pinouts.md C133-4 pin 6 against SD.pdf page 78 ECM bottom row — verify pin 6 connects to C114 CMP
spot_checks.notes: mfi-control-v6.md originally said C133-4 pin 2 for CMP. ecm-pinouts.md says pin 6. Verify which is correct.

spot_checks.lookup: Cross-reference ecm-pinouts.md C133-3 pin 19 against SD.pdf page 78 ECM bottom row — verify pin 19 connects to C112 TPS signal
spot_checks.notes: Original extraction had C133-3 pin 15. Corrected to pin 19 per ecm-pinouts.md. Verify.

spot_checks.lookup: Cross-reference ecm-pinouts.md C133-3 pin 1 against SD.pdf page 78 ECM bottom row — verify pin 1 connects to C125 MAF signal
Open EMA.pdf → page 2 → find 'Bore' row → verify mm and inch values
Open EMA.pdf → page 2 → find 'Cam height — Intake' row → verify specification range and service limit
spot_checks.notes: Multi-digit decimal with narrow range. OCR-error-prone: 43.95 vs 43.45 vs 43.15 all look similar.

spot_checks.lookup: Open EMA.pdf → page 2 → find 'Journal diameter' under Camshaft → verify specification range and service limit
spot_checks.notes: 5-digit precision. OCR frequently drops or swaps trailing digits at this precision level.

spot_checks.lookup: Open EMA.pdf → page 4 → find 'Engine oil pressure' row → verify kPa value, psi value, and temperature condition
